CustomField.description: Airline booking / fare-basis class codes negotiated on this fare line (e.g. J, C, D). Seeded from the fare product's Default Fare Codes when the line is added; a rep may adjust the set per deal. Non-price-impacting in the Term Builder demo.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Booking-class codes covered by this fare on this Term. Seeded from the product; adjust per deal.
CustomField.label: Fare Codes
